title: Organization
description: An organization involved with a resource, including parent or child organizations

name.title: name
name.description: The full name of the Organization

subOrganizationOf.title: suborganization of
subOrganizationOf.description: Represents hierarchical containment of Organizations or OrganizationalUnits; indicates an Organization which contains this Organization

altLabel.title: alternative label
altLabel.description: alternative name (trading name, colloquial name) for an organization

notation.title: notation
notation.description: List of abbreviations or codes from code lists for an organization (e.g. DOI, DOD)

prefLabel.title: preferred label
prefLabel.description: Preferred or legal name of the organization

_oldDocs.rationale: Improving the org:Organization class in DCAT-US 3.0 by supporting prefLabel, alternative labels, and abbreviations is essential to enhance organization representation. This enhancement accommodates variations in organization naming, promotes data interoperability, and improves discoverability within datasets. By incorporating these features, DCAT-US 3.0 aligns with best practices in data representation, enhances data search and transparency, and optimizes the overall usability of data resources.
